assessments.status_rationale: Today’s bullets contain no reporting about Platts/S&P Global JKM assessments reaching ≥$25.00/MMBtu on any publication day; no confirming price print is provided.
No Baltic Exchange TD3C VLCC MEG–China TCE data (or a ≥$100,000/day print) is mentioned in today’s news bullets.

CNBC reports IEA countries are meeting on a possible reserves release but explicitly says 'no decision made yet'; this is not an announced coordinated release of ≥60 million barrels tied to the conflict.
No ICE Endex Dutch TTF front-month settlement level is provided in the bullets; there is no evidence of a ≥€80.00/MWh settlement.
The bullets do not report the ICE BofA MOVE Index closing at or above 160 (or any specific MOVE close).
No information is provided on the S&P 500’s peak-to-trough drawdown from the 2026-03-03 close to any subsequent intraday low; the threshold (≥15%) cannot be verified from today’s bullets.
There is no mention of Lloyd’s Market Association/JWC listed-areas updates affecting the Persian Gulf/Strait of Hormuz region in today’s bullets.
Today’s bullets do not describe a joint announcement by at least three European countries of a new/expanded maritime security operation aimed at protecting Strait of Hormuz commercial shipping.
No UN Security Council adopted resolution (with ≥10 votes in favor) calling for de-escalation/ceasefire related to the U.S.–Iran conflict is reported in today’s bullets.
